Notice Of Motion Of Deft To Compel Further Responses To His Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Albert Bergonzi's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents.
Any response required by this order shall be served on defendant within ten days of the date of this order.

Special interrogatory 1.
Granted. Plaintiff shall provide a supplemental response with names and contact information, as may be available.

Special interrogatory 2. Denied without prejudice to propound a redrafted interrogatory or interrogatories seeking information concerning whether any action was taken to enforce the subject agreement, and if so, what action was taken

Form interrogatory 9.1
Moot, based on plaintiff's representation that a supplemental response has been provided.

Form interrogatory 12.1
Granted.

Form interrogatory 12.2 Granted. Plaintiff shall provide a supplemental response in code compliant form.

Form interrogatory 12.3
Denied.

Request for Production No. 1
Denied without prejudice to a renewed motion after documents have been produced and reviewed by defendant.

Request for Production No. 2
Denied. Request for Production No. 2, as drafted, is overbroad. Request denied without prejudice to propound future request or requests for production which are more specific or limited in scope. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
